title: Top Marigold star announces she is leaving company
summary: Utami Hayashishita has announced that she is leaving Dream Star Fighting Marigold. The company held a show at Korakuen Hall on Saturday, April 25, where Marigold World Champion Miku Aono successfully defended her title against Hayashishita in the main event. After the match, Hayashishita addressed the crowd and announced that she would be departing the […]
